side_effects.description: Histamine response with injection site irritation; reduced by 90% after diluting with more BAC water and allowing syringe to warm to room temperature for 20-30 minutes

protocol_notes: Protocol modification: dilute MOTS-C with additional BAC water and warm syringe to room temperature (20-30 minutes) before injection. Reports mild burning sensation after modification but 90% reduction in histamine response/skin reaction compared to previous protocol.
